description_long: This is a compact, olive-green armored combat vehicle with a low-profile turret and a prominent main cannon extending from the front. The hull is angular, with sloped armor panels and a wide, flat body supported by a set of five large road wheels on each side, connected by continuous tracks. On the rear left side, there is a cylindrical external fuel tank or storage container mounted horizontally. The turret features two circular hatches on top, and the vehicle's surfaces are smooth with minimal visible detailing. The vehicle's design suggests a focus on mobility and protection, with thick armor plating covering the entire body and turret. No visible markings, insignia, or camouflage patterns are present, and the paint is a uniform matte olive green.
description: A compact olive-green armored combat vehicle with a sloped turret, main cannon, and cylindrical rear storage tank, supported by tracked wheels. The exterior is smooth, angular, and uniformly painted with no visible markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main cannon, sloped armor, and wide tracks flanking the hull.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the five large road wheels, continuous track, turret profile, and cylindrical rear tank.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the cylindrical tank mounted across the back and the flat rear armor.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the turret, cannon, and track system, but without the cylindrical tank.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the front of the turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body and turret are covered in thick, sloped armor plating with no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid color; matte olive green with no visible camouflage pattern.
